details.productUrlName: Smallpox JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description: Each player loses 1 life, discards a card, sacrifices a creature of their choice, then sacrifices a land of their choice.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"One plane's poison is another's miracle cure. One plane's deadly plague is another's common cold. An interplanar medical body could save an unfathomable number of lives."
—Lisette, Witherbloom dean
